ocr_findings.description: The 学習のポイント mascot icon and sidebar box formatting are flattened to a blockquote in the cleaned OCR, but the 管理者によるアクセス explanatory text is fully captured.

reviewer_notes: Page covers 不正アクセス禁止法 definition and 不正アクセスとは section including the '4つの行為' header and (1)なりすましによるアクセス explanation (p.63). Cleaned OCR reproduces all content accurately including the sidebar about 管理者によるアクセス. No content loss. Label confirmed as content.
